title: Broccoli Stir Fry with Citrusy Sauce
description: A light and refreshing stir fry made with broccoli, a hint of citrus, and a rich Japanese-inspired sauce. Perfect as a quick lunch or dinner option.

ingredients.name: Citrusy Sauce (see notes)
ingredients.notes: See notes for citrus sauce recipe

instructions: Heat the grapeseed oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the broccoli and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until tender but still crisp.
In a small bowl, whisk together the citrus sauce, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Pour the sauce over the broccoli and stir-fry for an additional minute.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
